intro: Synaedrys reinwardtii, also known as Rauwolscia serpentina, is a plant species belonging to the Apocynaceae family. It is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its various health benefits, including its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory, anxiolytic, and antipyretic agent, as well as its potential to improve cognitive function and memory.
